changelog: Fix: Dashboard image backup logic now symmetric with file — clients with no image backup show as needing attention (same fix as file_ok=1 default issue)
Fix: Backup Types chart Image column now shows clients with no image backup as failed
Perf: 15-second cache on UrBackup status API call — dashboard no longer hammers UrBackup on every refresh
Fix: Activities page now shows running backups as '(stopping...)' after cancel signal, instead of immediately disappearing
Fix: Cancel backup message now accurately says 'Stop signal sent — backup may take a moment to stop'
